spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 2 of 2 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Adds an invalid-value probe for video and audio; Chrome DevTools verified both properties fall back to eager while preserving the invalid content attribute.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature/5200068565139456 reference link and the HTML media loading attribute section.

design_system.rationale: The repaired controls use CSS variables, no inline event handlers, and no raw hex colors in the concept source.

summary: Chrome DevTools verification exercised the compatibility probe and invalid-value fallback; the page now has the required references and no remaining critique questions.
